title: Super Mario Mash-Up: Extra Music
description: Extra music for the Super Mario Mash-up!
body:
This unofficial add-on for the [Super Mario Mash-up](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/super-mario-mash-up) adds three additional songs to account for situations the pack by itself doesn't: **Underwater** and the **credits**.

This is a separate download for those who want to add an extra bit of spice to the pack without having to make the main download inaccurate.
